svg.title: Unit Linked Indemnity Plan — Full Cashless Flow
svg.desc: End-to-end flow showing premium split, fund mechanics, risk pool, pre-authorisation, hospitalisation, and settlement for a unit linked indemnity cashless plan

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Who is the policyholder in a unit linked indemnity plan?')
sendPrompt('What is a premium allocation charge in a unit linked plan?')
sendPrompt('What is net premium after allocation charge?')
sendPrompt('How does NAV work in a unit linked health plan?')
sendPrompt('What charges are deducted by cancelling units monthly?')
sendPrompt('How does fund value change over time in a ULHP?')
sendPrompt('How does the risk pool work in an indemnity plan?')
sendPrompt('What is sum at risk in a unit linked plan?')
g.text: Risk charge falls as fund grows

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Are claims paid from the unit fund or the risk pool?')

svg.text: Claims do NOT touch your fund

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a policyholder is hospitalised?')
sendPrompt('What is a network hospital in health insurance?')
sendPrompt('How does cashless admission work at a network hospital?')
sendPrompt('What happens when you go to a non-network hospital?')
sendPrompt('What documents are needed for pre-authorisation in a cashless claim?')
sendPrompt('What does the TPA check before approving a pre-auth?')
sendPrompt('What options does a patient have if pre-auth is denied?')
sendPrompt('What is a Letter of Authorisation in cashless claims?')
sendPrompt('How is the running bill tracked during hospitalisation?')
sendPrompt('What deductions are applied at discharge in a cashless claim?')

svg.text: Your unit fund is unaffected by the claim — it continues to earn/lose based on NAV
